title: oxalis viscosissima
intro: Oxalis viscosissima, also known as sticky wood sorrel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Oxalis viscosissima include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
